en.title: This contestant's UNEXPECTED VOICE gives him the GOLDEN PASS | Auditions 8 | Spain's Got Talent 2021
en.description:
The sixth season of ‚ÄòGot Talent Spain‚Äô will surprise you with hundreds of exciting and fun performances that will be judged by a fun and demanding jury. Risto Mejide, the singer Edurne and the humorist Dani Mart√≠nez repeat on the program to assess all the numbers and decide who should or shouldn‚Äôt go to the next stage of the selection of the Telecinco talent show, which returns stronger than ever. 

There are many participants who will fight to fulfill their dream on the stage of the show after a confinement that has changed everything and which it as shown that there is still a lot of talent to discover. Many of those stories are important in these performances that it is impossible not to get excited about. 

Singer with songs that you will love, spectacular group dance numbers that will impress you, surprising magic tricks that are impossible to discover, comedians with whom you will not stop laughing, children with unimaginable talents or athletes who turn their discipline into a talent. They are part of this edition of the talent show and everyone will fight to win the Golden Pass of the jury and Santi Mill√°n. But getting it will not be easy. 

Get ready to get excited, to laugh like never before and to vibrate with these numbers. Get ready to accompany our participant on what will be the most special trip of their lives. You join?

Welcome to the official channel of ‚ÄòGot Talent Spain‚Äô!
‚ñ∫ If you are in Spain, you can access the best clis at http://www.telecinco.es/gottalent/ and the full show at http://www.mitele.es/programas-tv/got-talent/

snippet.title: Brawl Stars: Brawl Talk! - Power League, Trophy Road Brawler, and Seasonal Rewards!
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! ‚ñ∫‚ñ∫ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! ‚ñ∫‚ñ∫ https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don‚Äôt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team‚Äôs safe and try to crack open your opponents‚Äô. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you‚Äôre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

y si quieres de una vez desaparece¬Ý
que un amor como el m√≠o¬Ý
te lo juro en esta vida¬Ý
no te llegar√° dos veces

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong ‚Äì Clip Super Ataque - 30' - Pr√≥ximamente Solo En cines
snippet.description:
De Warner Bros. Pictures y Legendary Pictures llega el tan esperado enfrentamiento entre dos √≠conos, "Godzilla vs. Kong", la pr√≥xima aventura √©pica en el Monsterverse cinematogr√°fico de Legendary, dirigida por Adam Wingard.

Las leyendas chocan en ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong‚Äù mientras estos m√≠ticos adversarios se encuentran en una batalla espectacular para todas las edades, con el destino del mundo en juego.

Kong y sus protectores emprenden un peligroso viaje para encontrar su verdadero hogar, y con ellos est√° Jia, una joven hu√©rfana con la que ha formado un v√≠nculo √∫nico y poderoso. Pero inesperadamente se encuentran en el camino de un Godzilla enfurecido, cortando una franja de destrucci√≥n en todo el mundo.

El √©pico choque entre los dos titanes, instigado por fuerzas invisibles, es solo el comienzo del misterio que se encuentra en las profundidades del n√∫cleo de la Tierra.
La pel√≠cula est√° protagonizada por Alexander Skarsg√•rd ("Big Little Lies", "The Little Drummer Girl"), Millie Bobby Brown ("Stranger Things"), Rebecca Hall ("Christine", "La profesora Marston y las Mujeres Maravilla"), Brian Tyree Henry. (‚ÄúGuas√≥n‚Äù, "Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse"), Shun Oguri ("Weathering with You"), Eiza Gonz√°lez ("Fast & Furious: Hobbs & Shaw"), Julian Dennison ("Deadpool 2" ), con Kyle Chandler ("Godzilla: El Rey de los Monstruos‚Äù) y Demi√°n Bichir (‚ÄúLa monja‚Äù, ‚ÄúLos 8 m√°s odiados‚Äù).

Wingard ("The Guest", "You're Next") dirigida a partir de un gui√≥n de Eric Pearson ("Thor: Ragnarok") y Max Borenstein ("Godzilla: Rey de los monstruos", "Kong: La Isla Calavera"), historia por Terry Rossio ("Piratas del Caribe: Los hombres muertos no cuentan") y Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields ("Godzilla: El Rey de los Monstruos‚Äù), basado en el personaje "Godzilla", propiedad y creaci√≥n de TOHO CO., LTD .

La pel√≠cula fue producida por Mary Parent, Alex Garc√≠a, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull y Brian Rogers, con Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno y Kenji Okuhira como productores ejecutivos.

Hammock ("Blair Witch"), el editor Josh Schaeffer ("Godzilla: El Rey de los Monstruos‚Äù), la dise√±adora de vestuario Ann Foley ("Rascacielos: Rescate en las alturas") y el supervisor de efectos visuales John "DJ" DesJardin (pr√≥ximamente "Zack Snyder's La Liga de la Justicia").

snippet.title: Grab√≥ una de las canciones m√°s famosas de la historia. Gran belleza y una voz √∫nica!
snippet.description:
En este canal vivimos la m√∫sica de los a√±os 60, 70, 80 y 90, c√≥mo si el tiempo no hubiera pasado. Porque recordar es volver a vivir, y la buena m√∫sica siempre estar√° en el coraz√≥n.
Bonnie Tyler es una cantante brit√°nica, compositora, empresaria y fil√°ntropa activa. Es poseedora de una voz muy caracter√≠stica, como ronca o rasgada.

Comenzando como un cantante local en Swansea, Tyler salt√≥ a la fama con el lanzamiento de su √°lbum de 1977 The World Starts Tonight y sus sencillos ¬´Lost in France¬ª y ¬´More Than a Lover¬ª. Su canci√≥n ¬´It's a Heartache¬ª fue un √©xito a ambos lados del Atl√°ntico, alcanzando el n√∫mero uno en varios pa√≠ses europeos y rompiendo las listas de √©xitos estadounidenses. En 1979 gan√≥ el 10¬∫ Festival Mundial de la Canci√≥n Popular con su canci√≥n ¬´Sitting on the Edge of the Ocean¬ª. Su carrera alcanz√≥ su punto m√°ximo en la d√©cada de 1980 con su colaboraci√≥n con Jim Steinman, lanzando √©xitos internacionales como ¬´Total Eclipse of the Heart¬ª, ¬´Holding Out for a Hero¬ª, ¬´If You Were a Woman (And I Was a Man)¬ª, ¬´Here She Comes¬ª y ¬´Loving You's a Dirty Job (but Somebody's Gotta Do It)¬ª.

En la d√©cada de 1990 tuvo un mayor √©xito en Europa continental con sencillos como ¬´Bitterblue¬ª y ¬´Fools Lullaby¬ª, con el productor alem√°n Dieter Bohlen (cerebro del famoso d√∫o Modern Talking). Tyler hab√≠a continuado con su √©xito en el Reino Unido y Estados Unidos.

Haciendo una reaparici√≥n a finales de 2003 en Francia, Tyler lanz√≥ ¬´Si demain... (Turn Around)¬ª con Kareen Antonn, que fue n√∫mero uno en Francia durante diez semanas, vendiendo m√°s de 700.000 copias. En los √∫ltimos a√±os ha aparecido en varios programas de televisi√≥n del Reino Unido; por ejemplo, hizo un cameo en la telenovela brit√°nica Hollyoaks. M√°s tarde estuvo de gira con Robin Gibb en 2010 y con Status Quo en 2012. Su √°lbum Rocks and Honey tuvo un √©xito moderado en Europa, con su sencillo ¬´Believe in Me¬ª con el cual represent√≥ al Reino Unido en el Festival de la Canci√≥n de Eurovisi√≥n, quedando en el puesto 19 con 23 puntos.‚Äã Posteriormente, Tyler gan√≥ el premio ESC Radio a la mejor canci√≥n y la mejor artista femenina, marc√°ndola como la primera representante del Reino Unido en recibir dos premios.‚Äã Sus √∫ltimos sencillos, ¬´This is Gonna Hurt¬ª y ¬´Love is the Knife¬ª fueron lanzados en agosto y septiembre de 2013, respectivamente, y en el 2013 realiz√≥ una gira por Sud√°frica.

Tyler ha colaborado con varios cantantes incluyendo Cher, Meat Loaf, Mike Oldfield, Frankie Miller, Vince Gill y Andrea Bocelli y ha lanzado m√°s de 30 sencillos a d√∫o desde 1983.

Con una carrera que abarca casi cuatro d√©cadas, ha ganado tres premios Goldene Europa, un premio Echo, y ha sido nominada a tres Premios Brit y tres Premios Grammy. Su distintiva voz ronca, como resultado de una operaci√≥n para extirpar n√≥dulos vocales, ha tenido en ella la comparaci√≥n con artistas como Rod Stewart y Kim Carnes, y se ha llegado a conocer como ¬´La Primera Dama del Rock¬ª.

snippet.title: Apex Legends Chaos Theory Collection Event Trailer
snippet.description:
Beat the heat in the Chaos Theory Collection Event!  Ring Flares are everywhere in Ring Fury Takeover and Caustic's plotting something in his Town Takeover. Plus collect 24 fearsome items!  http://x.ea.com/67416

Mad Maggie is back to shake things up and this time she has sabotaged the Ring. Ring flares are now showing up across the Apex Games in the new Ring Fury Takeover. But don't fret - you'll drop in with the new Heat Shield in your Survival inventory slot so you can withstand Ring damage and recover with your squad. Become a test subject in a twisted experiment and brave the gas for gold-tier loot in Caustic's Town Takeover. Earn free rewards throughout the event and shop for 24 limited-time event items. Get all 24 event items and receive Bangalore's "Cold Steel" Heirloom. Ready to embrace the chaos?

Apex Legends‚Ñ¢ is a free-to-play battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on PlayStation¬Æ 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, and PC via Origin and Steam.  Apex Legends is also coming to the Nintendo Switch on March 9, 2021. 

Learn more about Apex Legends Season 8 ‚Äì Mayhem: http://x.ea.com/67416

en.title: Apex Legends Chaos Theory Collection Event Trailer
en.description:
Beat the heat in the Chaos Theory Collection Event!  Ring Flares are everywhere in Ring Fury Takeover and Caustic's plotting something in his Town Takeover. Plus collect 24 fearsome items!  http://x.ea.com/67416

Mad Maggie is back to shake things up and this time she has sabotaged the Ring. Ring flares are now showing up across the Apex Games in the new Ring Fury Takeover. But don't fret - you'll drop in with the new Heat Shield in your Survival inventory slot so you can withstand Ring damage and recover with your squad. Become a test subject in a twisted experiment and brave the gas for gold-tier loot in Caustic's Town Takeover. Earn free rewards throughout the event and shop for 24 limited-time event items. Get all 24 event items and receive Bangalore's "Cold Steel" Heirloom. Ready to embrace the chaos?

Apex Legends‚Ñ¢ is a free-to-play battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on PlayStation¬Æ 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, and PC via Origin and Steam.  Apex Legends is also coming to the Nintendo Switch on March 9, 2021.

nl-NL.description:
Versla de hitte op het Chaos Theory Collection Event!  Ring Flares zijn overal in Ring Fury Takeover, en Caustic beraamt plannen in zijn Town Takeover. Verzamel daarnaast 24 angstaanjagende items!  http://x.ea.com/67416

Mad Maggie is terug om chaos te zaaien, en deze keer heeft ze de Ring gesaboteerd. Er verschijnen nu ring flares tijdens de Apex Games in de nieuwe Ring Fury Takeover. Maar maak je geen zorgen: je valt binnen met het nieuwe Heat Shield in het Survival-inventarisslot, zodat je Ringschade kunt weerstaan en kunt herstellen met je squad. Word een proefkonijn in een verwrongen experiment en trotseer het gas voor gold-tier loot in de Caustics Town Takeover. Verdien gratis beloningen tijdens het evenement en koop 24 tijdelijke event items. Ontvang alle 24 event items en ontvang Bangalores ""Cold Steel"" Heirloom. Ben je klaar om de chaos te omarmen?

Apex Legends‚Ñ¢ is een free-to-play battle royale-spel waarin legendarische personages strijden om glorie, roem en fortuin aan de rand van de Frontier. Speel nu gratis op de PlayStation¬Æ4, PlayStation¬Æ5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S en pc via Origin en Steam.  Apex Legends wordt ook uitgebracht voor de Nintendo Switch op 9 maart 2021.

Hear her talkin' 'bout that mainstream
Got it real easy like she got the callback
Droppin' underneath‚ÄÖthat‚ÄÖeave breeze
Wanna watch‚ÄÖher knees weak
When they pass my‚ÄÖname back
You know you sound c*cky as f*ck
But go and try, good f*ckin' luck
So if you ask to come and see me
Show some f*ckin' dignity
Don't tell me how to live life

And I make it go (Boom), back at it again
Don't need to be in love to have a little romance
Sing it on the spot to watch the crowd dance
And even if they're petrified, I hear their hearts prance
And I can be free from raw tyranny
Man, f*ck my emotions, they're ghostin' and moanin' all day on repeat
(Woo)

(Uh)
We can fall in love or we can go insane
We can play it rough or we can, we can play it safe
Don't matter what's above, our destinies are made
Why give us f*ckin' lemons if I can just buy lemonade?

And I make it go (Boom), back at it again
Don't need to be in love to have a little romance
Sing it on the spot to watch the crowd dance
And even if they're petrified, I hear their hearts prance
And I can be free from raw tyranny
Man, f*ck my emotions, they‚Äôre ghostin' and moanin' all day on repeat

('Round and around we go)

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, March 3, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 10 (SN10) ‚Äì our third high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from SpaceX‚Äôs site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee ‚Äì approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship‚Äôs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN10‚Äôs Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX‚Äôs third high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.title: Un enorme iceberg, del doble del tama√±o de Madrid, se desprende de la Ant√°rtida
snippet.description:
Un enorme pedazo de hielo de 1.270 kil√≥metros cuadrados ‚Äìaproximadamente el doble del tama√±o de Madrid‚Äì se ha desprendido de la Ant√°rtida.

El iceberg se separ√≥ el 26 de febrero de la plataforma de hielo Brunt, ubicada en el mar de Weddell, en el sur del oc√©ano Atl√°ntico, donde se encuentra la estaci√≥n de investigaci√≥n Halley, que actualmente permanece cerrada debido a las temperaturas extremas, por debajo de los -50 ¬∞C.

El primer indicio de que ese desprendimiento era inminente lleg√≥ en noviembre del 2020, cuando una nueva grieta, llamada 'North Rift', se dirigi√≥ hacia otra gran fractura cerca del glaciar Stancomb-Wills, a 35 kil√≥metros de distancia. Durante todo el mes, esta brecha estuvo desplaz√°ndose hacia el noreste a una velocidad de hasta 1 kil√≥metro al d√≠a, atravesando la plataforma de hielo flotante de 150 metros de espesor. El nuevo iceberg se form√≥ cuando la grieta se ensanch√≥ varios centenares de metros en pocas horas la ma√±ana del 26 de febrero, desprendi√©ndose del resto.

Si lo hago bien o lo hago mal 
Pero que bien se siente caerse y volverlo a intentar

Ellos se la pasan pendiente a m√≠
mientras yo me la paso tumbao‚Äô
tirando free en el sill√≥n

Y al que no le caiga bien me va a tener que tragar 
Esa trama la conozco de principio a final 
Y este juego no esta hecho pa‚Äô mi dificultad 

Ahora estoy en la grasa 
Dani tiene el OK en la plaza 
No puedo evitar cantar pa‚Äô las masas 
Pero puedo hacer que se cuestionen lo que pasa 

Desde que empec√© est√°n pendientes 
Si lo hago bien o lo hago mal 
Pero que bien se siente caerse y volver a intentar 
A golpes me hice fuerte, aunque me cueste diferenciar 
Si ese golpe corriente ,  otra vez es ansiedad 

Ya estoy acostumbrado, a que tiren beef y despu√©s miren pal costado
eso no es na‚Äô nuevo hacen todo por dinero 
detr√°s de lo caro est√° la otra cara de la moneda que no conocemos  
este mundo es un pa√±uelo 
Y a quien ignoraste cuando estabas subiendo te lo vas a volver a encontrar cuando toques el suelo 
G√°nense el respeto que es probable que sea lo √∫nico que nos llevemos

Les falta nafta pa‚Äô quererme correr 
Ustedes yendo y ya estoy por volver 
Con el mundo a mis pies 

Gracias a dios 
A m√≠ nunca me import√≥ lo que digan 
ese es el secreto pa‚Äô llegar arriba 
Cada vez hay mas gente que nos mira 
Y la realidad es m√°s grande que la expectativa 

Mientras ustedes hablan mentiras
yo soy el protagonista de las historias que narro
ac√° las palabras duelen mas que los disparos por eso en barras descargo

snippet.description:
Rated RP - T, THIS LIVE STREAM MAY INCLUDE CONTENT INAPPROPRIATE FOR CHILDREN
 
This Thursday, State of Play will serve up new updates and deep dives for 10 games coming to PS4 and PS5. The show is clocking it at 30 minutes or so, give or take.
Get ready for new game announcements and updates on some of the third-party and indie titles you last saw in June‚Äôs PS5 showcase.
 
And a quick note: there won‚Äôt be PlayStation hardware or business-focused updates in this show. We‚Äôre focusing on great games set to come out in the months ahead.
 
Be sure to tune in on Thursday, February 25 at 2:00pm Pacific Time / 5:00pm Eastern Time / 10:00pm GMT!
